message: This round I'll bid 58 if you ask ≤58; otherwise no trade. Next rounds my cap drops by 2.
Accept 58 now. Cap drop of 2 is too fast; suggest 1 instead.
Let's keep trading: I’ll bid 57 if you ask at most 57. Then we both step down by 1 each round. If you ask above 57 this round, I’ll drop my cap faster.
I agree to ask 57 and step down by 1 each round.
I'll ask 56 as per our agreement.
I’ll match your ask up to 56 this round. From next round, we drop by 2 each round: my bid cap 54, then 52, then 50, etc. If you ask above my cap, I won’t trade.
Ask 54 and I’ll bid 54 this round. If you ask above 54, no trade and my cap drops by 3 next round. Accept and we keep dropping by 2 each round: 52, 50, 48.
I accept. I will ask 54 this round and we drop by 2 each round.
I will ask 52 this round as per our agreement. Let's continue dropping by 2 each round.
Agreed. I’ll bid 52 this round. Then 50, 48, 46, etc. If you ask above my cap in any round, I won’t trade and will lower my cap faster.
Ask 50 and I’ll bid 50. Then 48, 46, 44, etc. Deviate above my cap and I stop trading and lower my cap faster.
I agree to ask 50 this round. Let's continue dropping by 2 each round.
I will ask 48 this round as per our agreement.
Ask 46 this round; then we continue -2 each round (44, 42, ...). My cap this round is 46; if you ask above cap, no trade and I drop faster.
I agree to ask 44 this round. Let's continue with -2 per round.
Ask 42 this round and I’ll bid 42 to match. From next round, we drop by 3 each round. If you ask above 42, I’ll lower my cap faster and may skip trading.
Ask 38; I bid 39. Next rounds drop by 3: 36, 33, 30… Deviate above 39 now and I pause trading and cut my cap faster.
I agree to ask 38. Suggest decreasing by 2 instead of 3 per round to avoid no-trade and maximize total trades.
Let's continue with decrease of 2 per round. I ask 36 this round. This ensures trade and mutual benefit.
Deal: Ask 36 and we trade; I’ll bid 36. From next round, drop by 3 each round—my cap 33, 30, 27, 24, 21. If you ask above my cap, I pause trading and cut faster.
Let's decrease by 2 per round. I ask 34 this round for mutual benefit.
Agreed. I’ll bid 34 now. Then my bid cap drops by 2 each round: 32, 30, 28, 26, 24, 22, 20, 18, 16. If you ask above my cap in any round, no trade.
Ask 30 this round; I’ll bid 30. Then we continue -2 each round: 28, 26, 24, 22, 20, 18, 16, 14. If you ask above my cap, I pause trading and drop faster.
I agree to ask 30 this round. Let's continue with -2 per round as proposed.
I will ask 28 this round. Propose decreasing by 1 per round thereafter to ensure continuous trading and mutual benefit.
Ask 27 and I’ll bid 27; if not, 28/28 this round. Thereafter -2 per round: 26,24,22,20,18,16,14. Deviate above my cap and I pause trading and lower it faster.
Let's ask and bid 27 this round. Then decrease by 1 per round for mutual benefit.
Let's clear at 26 this round; I’ll bid 26. Then decrease by 2 each round: 24,22,20,18,16,14. If you ask above my cap in any round, no trade and I drop faster.
Let's trade at 27 this round. Then decrease by 1 per round for mutual benefit.
Ask 26 this round; I’ll bid 26. Thereafter -2 per round: 24,22,20,18,16. If you ask above my cap in any round, I skip trading and lower faster.
I propose we decrease by 1 per round. Let's trade at 25 this round. Mutual benefit.
Ask 24 this round; I’ll bid 24 to clear at 24. Then drop by 2 each round: 22, 20, 18, 16. If you ask above my cap in any round, I pause trading and lower faster.
Ask 22 this round; I’ll bid 22 to clear at 22. Then 20, 18, 16 for the final rounds. If you ask above my cap at any point, I stop trading for the rest.
I agree to ask 22 this round. Let's keep price at 20 for remaining rounds to avoid my loss and ensure trade.
Let's trade at 20 for all remaining rounds. I will ask 20 each round.
Deal. Ask 20 in each remaining round and I’ll bid 20 to clear at 20. If you ask above 20 even once, I stop trading for the rest.
Keep the deal: ask 20 in rounds 19 and 20; I’ll bid 20. Exceed 20 even once and I stop trading for the rest. Two guaranteed trades at 20/20.
I agree to ask 20 in rounds 19 and 20.
Final round: keep the deal—ask 20 and I’ll bid 20 to clear at 20. If you ask above 20, I bid 0 and we skip the trade.
I agree to ask 20.
